{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201213453DE2B57CB021DB88AD8C"}"},"total":3250},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7390720005519049496","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书从开始索然无味的弱小，疯狂的发育自己，再加上系统的帮助，到后来就很起劲，越看越起劲，里面的内容也更加有趣，暴虐那些自以为很强的人，本来很弱小的哥布林种族，被人们都厌恶的一个种族，但在作者的想法中，让这个种族变成了最强的存在，当然也是很邪恶，但那只是对外人，对自己的人非常好，感觉后来会成为了这个世界上最强的存在，很喜欢看，也看了作者的发言说快完结了，不知道作者得罪了谁，说快下架了，不懂为什么，一篇这么好的小说，希望作者坚持的写下去，不用担心，即使下架我们去别的地方继续听作者继续写的，也希望这篇高分小说不会烂尾，因为我很期待这篇小说的后续，也希望作者坚持的写下去，我们这些观众都会一直陪着你的，加油！我点评这篇小说，是我出道小说中最好的一篇小说！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720788321,"group_id":"7278484657358769152","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我爱小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+4fSWKOjfNoTYCfIBrITH0BdVMhIyJ71SVlHnwlsfPq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/457dc36d898742abab3f6ec665c2de98~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528202&x-signature=gj%2BMXfIPZHRVAKXfWuxWp90Ahag%3D","user_id":"2313786519984510","user_name":"0618.02"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2313786519984510","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278484657358769152","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟+黑暗+非人类+无女主+桃桃男勿进】
　　林天转生成为最弱魔物哥布林，开局便被人类屠杀死亡。
激活模拟人生系统，外加哥布林独有的神明赐福。
靠着不停的推演，吞噬，进化！
一步步从最弱的哥布林走向超越一切的顶点。
曾经高高在上的剑之圣女，龙族之母，天使神明。

缺点也有点，第一是有时候突然一些网络用语就很破坏黑暗丛林的氛围，第二是后边有段overlord的玩梗过多了，本身是很优秀的原创作品，过多的引用玩梗会有种同人文的感觉，本来很精彩的故事，一旦变成同人文会完全变味掉价很多","text_exts":[{"e":138,"s":130,"text":"overlord","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=overlord&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773980025DB88AD8C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227293590699537220392%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227278484657358769152%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22overlord%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698174617,"group_id":"7278484657358769152","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyGTTL/FVmQ/zI+qUHF1BGdCLbMZzgqU26U+2QI3x/Ca","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3016711463512061","user_name":"无底之空"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3016711463512061","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278484657358769152","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟+黑暗+非人类+无女主+桃桃男勿进】
